category_sources: source_facts.description says Apache Thrift is a framework for scalable cross-language services development; source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Thrift site.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Thrift site; source_facts.description names the framework purpose and source_facts.name is thrift.
docs_sources: Official Apache Thrift site has dedicated /docs and /tutorial documentation sections; official Apache GitHub repository README is also an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Apache Thrift download/developer pages identify GitHub apache/thrift as the source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says scalable cross-language services development; official Apache Thrift site describes a framework combining a software stack with a code generation engine.
